programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin

programme.desc: S1 E81 Kinjal tries to confirm if it was Umang whom she saw outside the temple; Gopi soaks Ahem's laptop in soap water and hangs it to dry on the clothesline.
programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya

programme.desc: S2 E355 Tulsi and Mihir Virani navigate the ensuing challenges that emerge in their family which has endured a lengthy passage of time.
programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.desc: S1 E2083 Anupamaa sacrifices her personal ambitions to dedicate her life to her family. However, she eventually decides to live on her own terms after failing to receive credit for her many trials.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.desc: S1 E5227 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S1 E89 A reserved businessman who avoids romance crosses paths with an artist haunted by a bitter past, leaving the prospect of a budding romance hanging in the balance.
programme.title: Oh Humnava Tum Dena Saath Mera

programme.desc: S1 E857 Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.
programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha
